title: 🏷️ PROGRAMME EPISODE
data_structure:
\[
  {
    "name": "title",
    "mandatory": true,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "The Falls Guys"
  },
  {
    "name": "season\_number",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "number",
    "example": "2"
  },
  {
    "name": "season\_episode\_number",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "number",
    "example": "2"
  },
  {
    "name": "original\_air\_date",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "2017-12-08"
  },
  {
    "name": "duration",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "PT55M"
  }
]
